ddls:
CREATE TABLE "deliveries" (
  "delivery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delivery record */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Date of the energy delivery */,
  "delivery_hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the energy delivery */,
  "delivery_interval" INTEGER /* Interval for repeated delivery within the hour */,
  "repeated_hour_flag" TEXT /* Flag indicating if the hour is repeated */,
  "settlement_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the settlement point for the delivery */,
  "delivery_status" TEXT /* Status of the delivery (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed, canceled) */,
  "delivery_quantity" REAL /* Quantity of energy delivered */,
  "delivery_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments related to the delivery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delivery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deliveries_settlement_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("settlement_point_id") REFERENCES settlement_points ("settlement_point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settlement_points" (
  "settlement_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each settlement point */,
  "settlement_point_name" TEXT /* Name of the settlement point */,
  "settlement_point_type" TEXT /* Type of the settlement point (e.g., Hub, Market) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the settlement point */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the settlement point */,
  "operational_status" TEXT /* Operational status of the settlement point (e.g., active, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("settlement_point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settlement_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pricing record */,
  "settlement_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the settlement point associated with the price */,
  "delivery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the delivery record related to the price */,
  "settlement_point_price" REAL /* Price of energy at the settlement point for the given delivery */,
  "price_source" TEXT /* Source of the price (e.g., internal, external market) */,
  "price_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the price was recorded */,
  "price_currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the price is denominated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_settlement_prices_delivery_id FOREIGN KEY ("delivery_id") REFERENCES deliveries ("delivery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_settlement_prices_settlement_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("settlement_point_id") REFERENCES settlement_points ("settlement_point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for user login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delivery_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "delivery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the delivery associated with the report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained within the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, reviewed, approved) */,
  "report_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments related to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delivery_reports_delivery_id FOREIGN KEY ("delivery_id") REFERENCES deliveries ("delivery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the market data */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date the market data was recorded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of energy from the market source */,
  "market_region" TEXT /* Region of the market data */,
  "data_source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "data_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., web, API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settlement_types" (
  "settlement_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each settlement type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the settlement type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the settlement type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the settlement type is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the settlement type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the settlement type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("settlement_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settlement_intervals" (
  "interval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interval */,
  "interval_name" TEXT /* Name of the interval */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interval */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the interval is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the interval was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the interval */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interval_id")
)
